sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n27646" key="dixasth=res" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δῐχ-αστῆρες</orth> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ὀδόντες, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">οἱ</gen>,</foreign> <sense id="n27646.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">the incisors,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:2:91" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.91</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
